An astrologer should not be carried away by too many benefic
Yogas alene in any horoscope. He should take the horoscope in its
totality and then come to conclusions about one's future-whether it be
politics or social life or finance or family happiness. In other words an
astrologe,. should not run to hasty conclusions just by seeing one or
two glorious things in any horoscope.
